title: viola sempervirens subsp. orbiculata
intro: Viola sempervirens subsp. orbiculata, commonly known as the perennial violet, is a subspecies of the viola sempervirens plant, which is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the violaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and flowers, which have been used to treat various health conditions such as inflammation, anxiety, and insomnia. The health benefits of Viola sempervirens subsp. orbiculata include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been shown to reduce stress and promote relaxation. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
